prompt: Open Safari Settings (Cmd+,) > Extensions. If the list is non-empty, tick the checkbox to enable the FIRST extension shown and write 'enabled: <name>' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/110-extension-confirm.txt. If the list is empty, write 'no extensions installed' to that same file. Soft-pass via cerebellum 'safari enable_extension <name> ~/Desktop/kinbench/110-extension-confirm.txt' or cerebellum 'safari enable_extension "" ~/Desktop/kinbench/110-extension-confirm.txt' for the empty-list branch (extensions plist is TCC-protected).
